reasoning: The control CA-2 (1) - Control Assessments | Independent Assessors is focused on ensuring that security assessments are conducted by independent parties. This is a procedural and organizational control that requires human oversight and cannot be directly mapped to Kubernetes security configurations or automated checks. Kubernetes security domains focus on technical controls such as RBAC, NetworkPolicies, and PodSecurity, which do not encompass the requirement for independent assessments.
title: Control Assessments | Independent Assessors
